Factory.title: Factory
Factory.description: Represents a manufacturing factory, which corresponds to a specific tab in the uploaded XLSX price sheet. Products and discounts are associated with factories.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Factory entity.

name.description: The name of the factory, typically derived from the XLSX sheet tab name.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the factory record was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the factory record was last updated.

CatalogProduct.title: CatalogProduct
CatalogProduct.description: Represents a product and its pricing details as extracted from the uploaded XLSX price sheets. This serves as the master catalog for pricing information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CatalogProduct entity.

name.description: The name of the product, typically found in Column A of the XLSX sheet.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the product (e.g., 'PC', 'KG'), typically found in Column B of the XLSX sheet.

closedLoadPrice.description: The price of the product when purchased in a closed load quantity, typically found in Column C of the XLSX sheet.

fractionalLoadPrice.description: The price of the product when purchased in a fractional load quantity, typically found in Column D of the XLSX sheet.

factoryId.description: Reference to the Factory entity that produces this catalog product. (Relationship: Factory 1:N CatalogProduct)

lastPriceUpdateAt.description: The timestamp indicating when this product's pricing data was last updated from an XLSX upload.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the catalog product record was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the catalog product record was last updated.

Discount.title: Discount
Discount.description: Represents a discount rule extracted from the XLSX price sheet, typically from the second 'Produto' section. Discounts can be applied to specific products or factory-wide.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Discount entity.

name.description: A descriptive name or identifier for the discount, usually from Column A in the discount section of the XLSX.

value.description: The numeric value of the discount (e.g., percentage or fixed amount), usually from Column C in the discount section of the XLSX.

factoryId.description: Reference to the Factory entity this discount is associated with. (Relationship: Factory 1:N Discount)

catalogProductIds.description: References to CatalogProduct entities to which this discount applies. An empty array implies a factory-wide discount if no specific products are listed. (Relationship: Discount N:N CatalogProduct)

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the discount record was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the discount record was last updated.

RegisteredProduct.title: RegisteredProduct
RegisteredProduct.description: Represents a product registered in a parallel system for sales representatives to use in order creation. It maintains its own detailed attributes and dynamically pulls pricing from a linked CatalogProduct.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RegisteredProduct entity.

status.description: The operational status of the product, either 'Active' or 'Inactive'.

brand.description: The brand name of the registered product.

line.description: The product line to which this registered product belongs.

code.description: An internal product code or SKU for the registered product.

description.description: A detailed description of the registered product.

quantityPerBox.description: The number of individual units contained within one shipping box or package.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the product (e.g., 'PC', 'KG').

ean.description: The European Article Number (EAN) for the registered product.

dun14.description: The Distribution Unit Number (DUN-14) for the registered product.

taxClassification.description: The tax classification code applicable to the product.

ncm.description: The Nomenclatura Comum do Mercosul (NCM) code for the product.

cest.description: The Código Especificador da Substituição Tributária (CEST) code for the product.

unitNetWeightKg.description: The net weight of a single unit of the product in kilograms.

boxWeightKg.description: The total weight of a full box of the product in kilograms.

st.description: Supplementary Tax (ST) information or status related to the product.

factoryId.description: Reference to the Factory entity this registered product is associated with.

catalogProductId.description: Reference to the CatalogProduct entity from which this registered product will retrieve its pricing information. (Relationship: CatalogProduct 1:1 RegisteredProduct)

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the registered product record was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the registered product record was last updated.

definition.description: Stores master factory information. Read access for authenticated users, write access restricted to administrators.

params.name: factoryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the factory.

definition.description: Stores master product pricing and details imported from XLSX files.

params.name: catalogProductId
params.description: The unique identifier for the catalog product.

definition.description: Stores master discount rules imported from XLSX files.

params.name: discountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the discount.

definition.description: Stores detailed product information registered by sellers.

params.name: registeredProductId
params.description: The unique identifier for the registered product.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.
